title: Interactive Predictive Dashboard
description: A comprehensive end-to-end sales analysis platform featuring automated data pipelines in Python, rich interactive dashboards in Power BI and Tableau, and sales trend forecasts.

title: Smart Inventory Predictor
description: An AI-powered inventory replenishment optimization system. Employs Scikit-learn regressors and TensorFlow/Keras LSTM networks to forecast product demand and mitigate stockout risks.

title: HexaWeb SaaS Web Platform
description: A multi-stack responsive SaaS portal. Utilizes HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap 5, Express.js backend, and MySQL database to manage real-time client registrations, subscriptions, and billing.

title: QuantumDesk CRM Application
description: A high-performance enterprise client relationship management program built using JavaFX and C#. Features responsive local database syncing, offline mode, and interactive reporting tools.
